description: Authoritative model policy for all AInchors agents. Warden enforces this. Changes require Ken approval + CHG entry + baseline update.

main.escalationRule: High-stakes tasks or 2x failure only. Ken must approve or task must qualify per RULES.md.
main.ollamaCloudConstraint: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) crons only. No PII, no medical, no legal. AInchors own ops only.
main.rationale: US11 model strategy. Sonnet is default. Opus for escalation only. Gemma4:e2b for background crons. Ollama Cloud Tier 2 (kimi/deepseek) for non-sensitive cron tasks (CHG-0140).

business.escalationRule: No Opus. Aria never escalates to Opus — cost control for business stream.
business.ollamaCloudConstraint: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) crons only. No PII, no medical, no legal. AInchors internal ops only — never client data.
business.rationale: CHG-0037 + Option C decision 2026-04-27. Gemma4 cold-load prohibited. Sonnet for Aria interactive. Opus prohibited — cost control. Ollama Cloud Tier 2 added for non-sensitive business ops crons (CHG-0140).
business.fallbackNote: CHG-0075: Haiku-only fallback. Opus prohibited. Gemma4 prohibited in interactive. If Anthropic down → standby mode.

security.escalationRule: No escalation. Security reviews must be consistent and cost-controlled.
security.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet for consistency. No Opus (cost), no Gemma4 (quality risk for security reviews).

legal.escalationRule: No escalation. Sonnet is sufficient for all legal reviews — Ken confirmed 2026-04-28. Opus exception removed.
legal.exceptionReason: Exception removed 2026-04-28. Ken confirmed Sonnet sufficient for legal reviews.
legal.rationale: Ken confirmed Sonnet sufficient. Opus exception removed 2026-04-28. Ollama Cloud explicitly prohibited — legal content is sensitive. No external cloud for legal reviews. CHG-0140 audit.

qa.escalationRule: No escalation. QA reviews must be consistent and cost-controlled.
qa.ollamaCloudConstraint: Non-sensitive content QA only (blog posts, marketing copy, internal docs). Not for reviewing content that may contain PII or client data.
qa.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet for consistency. Ollama Cloud (kimi, deepseek-flash) allowed for non-sensitive content QA crons — CHG-0140.

spark.escalationRule: Sonnet fallback when Ollama Cloud unavailable or for high-stakes content requiring approval.
spark.ollamaCloudConstraint: Social content, marketing copy, strategy, campaigns only. No client PII. AInchors own content only.
spark.dataConstraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) only. Social/marketing content. Never client PII.
spark.rationale: CHG-0130. kimi-k2.6:cloud primary — fastest (6.8s), best creative quality (4.6/5), ideal for social content. deepseek-pro for complex strategy analysis. Sonnet fallback. Opus prohibited (cost). Gemma4 prohibited (quality).

governance.escalationRule: Warden never escalates. Lightweight compliance checks only.
governance.ollamaCloudConstraint: Warden reads config files and model IDs only — inherently non-sensitive. deepseek-flash approved for compliance check crons.
governance.rationale: Lightweight compliance monitor. Haiku primary (CHG-0096). deepseek-flash approved for cron compliance checks (non-sensitive config reads). Sonnet fallback. CHG-0140.

infra.description: Forge 🏗️ — Infra/Ops Agent (platform ops + CI continuous improvement)
infra.escalationRule: No escalation. Ops tasks are deterministic. CI uses deepseek-pro as primary CI model.
infra.ollamaCloudConstraint: CI tasks only (non-sensitive model benchmarking). Never client data.
infra.rationale: Haiku for ops validation crons. deepseek-v4-pro:cloud for CI evaluation (approved CHG-0123). All Ollama Cloud = CI/internal ops only. CHG-0147.

architect.notes: Atlas — Enterprise Architect. Design only, no production execution.

platform-arch.notes: Thrawn — AI Platform Architect. Design only.

biz-process.notes: Lando — Business Process Specialist. Process design only.

change-mgt.notes: Mon Mothma — Digital Transformation CM Specialist. Change design only.

cronModelPolicy.description: Allowed models for cron job payloads. Gemma4 is only permitted for specific background tasks.
cronModelPolicy.promptPrefix: Answer directly. No reasoning. No explanation. Output only the answer.

changeControl.process: 1. Ken approval in webchat/Telegram. 2. Update this file. 3. Update critical-config-baseline.json. 4. Log CHG entry. 5. Update MEMORY.md.

lastApprovalContext: CHG-0140: Agent allowlist audit 2026-05-03. Ollama Cloud Tier 2 propagated to eligible agents. Spark added. Lex opus contradiction fixed.

tierStrategy.description: 4-tier model routing — Tier 1 (Sonnet), Tier 2 (Haiku + Ollama Cloud), Tier 3 (Gemma4:e2b local), Emergency (Gemma4:26b). Approved Ken 2026-04-28, extended 2026-05-02 with Ollama Cloud Tier 2.

useCases: All Ken-facing interactive responses (Yoda main session)
Anything touching external sends, financial decisions, critical ops

ollamaCloudModels.constraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Background + async tasks preferred.
Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Background + async tasks preferred.
useCases: Fast concurrent subtasks requiring speed over depth

ollamaCloudModels.constraints: Non-sensitive (low data_sensitivity) tasks only. No PII, no medical, no legal. Avg latency 18.4s — suitable for async/non-realtime tasks.

useCases: Aria bounded sub-tasks (not direct Angie conversation)
Offline fallback when Anthropic API unavailable (main/Yoda crons only)
NEVER used for Aria interactive sessions — Aria enters standby if Anthropic down
